<!-- Generated By: Claude Code (Claude Opus 4.6) -->
# Verification Templates

Use these during Phase 3 to verify claims from subagent reports. Each template produces a
claim AND its evidence simultaneously — don't extract claims from prose then verify
separately.

## Templates

```
TIMING: [function_name] is called [frequency]
  Evidence: [file:line] — gating condition is [quoted code]

CONFIGURABLE: [element] uses [config_source]
  Evidence: [file:line] — code reads [runtime config source | compile-time constant]

BINDING: [event] on [widget] triggers [handler]
  Evidence: [file:line] — bind() target is [widget_name]

SCOPE: [guard] protects [function] at [all | some] call sites
  Evidence: call sites at [file:line, file:line, ...] — guard present at [list]

ENTRY_POINT: [arg/endpoint/handler] accepts [values]
  Evidence: [file:line] — [parser/router/binding] definition

CROSS_MODULE: [producer] returns [value], [consumer] reinterprets as [meaning]
  Evidence: producer at [file:line], consumer at [file:line]

PLATFORM: [behavior] differs by platform
  Evidence: [platform_A at file:line] vs [platform_B at file:line]

DEGRADATION: [external_call] fails → [fallback behavior]
  Evidence: [file:line] — except branch [quoted code]
```

## Discovering Which Templates to Apply

Scan each subagent behavioral statement for trigger words. A single statement can generate
multiple claim types — apply all that match.

| Trigger words/patterns | Template |
|----------------------|----------|
| "every Ns", "periodically", "interval", "poll", "refresh" | TIMING |
| "configurable", "setting", "user can change", "default" | CONFIGURABLE |
| "on click", "when event", "triggers", "fires", "listens" | BINDING |
| "always", "never", "all cases", "every call" | SCOPE |
| "accepts", "flag", "endpoint", "route", "argument" | ENTRY_POINT |
| Cross-module function call, callback, return value consumed elsewhere | CROSS_MODULE |
| "on Windows", "on Linux", "platform", "OS-specific" | PLATFORM |
| "if unavailable", "timeout", "fails", "fallback", "except" | DEGRADATION |

## Verification Priority

| Priority | Claim types | Action |
|----------|-------------|--------|
| **High — verify all** | TIMING, CONFIGURABLE, SCOPE, CROSS_MODULE, ENTRY_POINT | Every claim gets a filled template with file:line evidence |
| **Medium — verify on sample** | BINDING (spot-check complex ones), PLATFORM (verify both sides exist), event suppression (verify when it changes user-visible behavior), DEGRADATION (verify each external dep) | Verify representative examples; flag untested claims |
| **Low — skip** | Enum/constant values, file paths, static text/labels | Accept subagent reports |
